items.title: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento (Unauthenticated PHP object injection)
items.summary: An unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer allows remote code execution via a crafted cookie on any storefront request.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce | APSB26-49
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities, including arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Modern Minds Magento 2 WordPress Integration
items.summary: A Stored XSS vulnerability in the Modern Minds Magento 2 WordPress Integration allows attackers to inject malicious scripts.

items.title: Reflected Cross-Site Scripted (XSS) vulnerability in Codazon Magento Themes
items.summary: A reflected XSS vulnerability in Codazon Magento Themes allows attackers to execute arbitrary Javascript in a user's browser via a crafted payload.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: A critical flaw in Magento's REST API allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This security update addresses multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to security feature bypass, privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and arbitrary file system read.

items.title: Improper Access Control and Stored Cross-Site Scripting in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: An Improper Access Control vulnerability could result in a security feature bypass, and a stored XSS vulnerability could be abused by a low-privileged attacker to inject malicious scripts.

items.title: SessionReaper: Unauthenticated RCE in Magento & Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This critical vulnerability allows customer account takeover and unauthenticated remote code execution, particularly in instances using file-based session storage.
